summary_one_line: Input must contain a literal "Host:" custom header so Curl_checkheaders returns non-NULL ptr and the true branch is taken

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The input must embed the exact header-name literal "Host:" (bytes 47 48 6f 73 74 3a) so Curl_checkheaders(data, STRCONST("Host")) finds it and returns a non-NULL ptr, satisfying the `ptr &&` condition of the blocker.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries the literal "Host:" at offsets 0x24-0x29 (47 48 6f 73 74 3a = "GHost:"), an exact string CMP target that I2SRandReplace substitutes from the CmpLogObserver buffer; the byte-diff shows W bytes at 0x25-0x29 are saturated to the "Host:" characters (48,6f,73,74,3a) while L is scattered.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds lack a clean "Host:" literal at the header offsets (e.g. seed 1 has 47 48 = "GH" then 2e "." rather than "ost:"; seed 3/4/5 are dominated by '%' and '+' filler), so Curl_checkheaders returns NULL, ptr is false, and the true branch is never taken.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc run the I2SRandReplace mutator, which reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer for the strcmp/memcmp of the "Host" header name and substitutes the matched operand into the input, planting the exact "Host:" literal that naive/value_profile must instead stumble onto by blind havoc; the lineage dash-row floor confirms an I2S find in the winner's ancestor chain.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same program-side requirement — a "Host:" header making ptr non-NULL — but reached purely by extra havoc/token mutation budget rather than CMP introspection, since both fast and minimizer lack I2S.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: fast resolves 8/10 vs minimizer 2/10 with hitcount 394 vs 75; fast's AFLFast FAST power schedule gives rarely-hit coverage buckets up to 4x energy, so the rare seeds that already contain a partial "Host:" header get many more havoc mutations and more often complete the literal.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: minimizer uses PowerSchedule None with energy from intrinsic calibration only, not weighted by region rarity, so the rare path to the "Host:"-bearing input gets no extra mutation budget and it blocks 8/10 with far lower hitcount (75).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The fast vs minimizer delta is purely the AFLFast `n_fuzz`-based rare-edge power schedule (FAST) which multiplies the mutation budget for rarely-exercised coverage buckets; neither fuzzer has CMP logging, so the win is extra havoc dosing on rare paths, not comparison-solving.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker true side requires ptr non-NULL, where ptr is set by Curl_checkheaders for the "Host" header.
The blocker condition gates the true branch on ptr being non-NULL.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the literal "Host:" bytes 47 48 6f 73 74 3a at offset 0x24.
Winner bytes at the header offsets are saturated to the "Host:" characters while loser bytes are scattered.
evidence_trail.cited_section: BYTE DIFF (W vs L at common offsets)

evidence_trail.claim: Loser-blocking seeds lack a clean "Host:" literal at the header offsets.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes a CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: The winner vpc seed's ancestor chain contains I2S-floor dash rows, direct lower-bound evidence of an I2S contribution.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
their presence in a winning
seed's ancestor chain is direct (lower-bound) evidence of I2S
contribution.

evidence_trail.claim: The fast vs minimizer delta is the AFLFast rare-edge power schedule giving rare paths up to 4x energy.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
Rarely-hit
paths get up to 4× energy; saturated paths are damped to 0.4×.

evidence_trail.claim: minimizer uses PowerSchedule None so energy is not weighted by region hit-frequency.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
PowerSchedule is `None`, so the
energy uses ONLY intrinsic calibration and is NOT weighted by how often
a region has been hit.

evidence_trail.claim: fast resolves more trials and has much higher branch hitcount than minimizer.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 129 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 03a52d351064c850` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 11 and 12 of the 13-level ancestor chain

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness that gates on a non-NULL Host-header lookup but whose header-name literal is supplied at runtime (not present as a constant CMP operand) showing cmplog/vpc with no advantage over naive/value_profile would refute the I2S-literal hypothesis.

weakest_evidence_point: Whether the fast>minimizer win is genuinely the AFLFast rarity schedule rather than noise — its subject-level p_AUC=0.1041 is not significant and prob_div is only 0.60.
